framework.name: VIC Single-Hop Only — No Delegation Chain
framework.description: The entire VIC architecture is human→agent→merchant. There is zero mention of agent-to-agent delegation, multi-hop auth chains, or sub-agent credential passing. The Passkey is user-held, the instruction is user-authenticated, and the agent executes. This confirms single-hop assumption.
framework.raw_quote: the agent will request whether the user agrees that the agent can make the purchase on the user's behalf

source.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce (VIC) - Integration Starter Kit
